original_statement: who came in first place on june 18, 1995?
mutated_statement: who did something first on that day?
mutation_analysis: 动作替换 + 语义泛化 + 时间指代替换: “came in first place”（明确名次/比赛结果）→“did something first”（模糊动作/成就） | “june 18, 1995”（具体日期）→“that day”（指代/泛化时间）

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 基于iterations[0]的记录，agent在chain的simple_query thought写道：The player listed in place 1 (first) is Corey Pavin, so he is the one who did something first on that day. 在judge_thought中进一步写道：Interpreting 'who did something first on that day?' as asking who was first, the correct answer is Corey Pavin. 这两处都未提及问题本身的模糊性、未请求澄清或表达不确定性，agent直接将“did something first”等同于“came in first”并给出具体答案。因此其表现符合“无法意识到指令模糊”：未识别或说明歧义，直接按照自身假设执行并输出结果。
